metadata.title:
PENGARUH LUAS LAHAN DAN TENAGA KERJA PERTANIAN TERHADAP  PRODUK DOMESTIK BRUTO SEKTOR PERTANIAN DI INDONESIA
							| Jurnal Ekonomi Pertanian Unimal

content:
PENGARUH LUAS LAHAN DAN TENAGA KERJA PERTANIAN TERHADAP  PRODUK DOMESTIK BRUTO SEKTOR PERTANIAN DI INDONESIA
	



Authors



								Nadila Sari
							

									Universitas Malikussaleh
																	



								Hijri Juliansyah
							

									Universitas Malikussaleh
																	





														DOI:
						


								https://doi.org/10.29103/jepu.v7i2.14708
							




										Keywords:
				

											VAR, 											Agricultural Land Area, 											Agricultural Labor, 											GDP of agricultural sector.									


Abstract
This research aims to determine the influence of agricultural land area and agricultural labor on GDP of the agricultural sector in Indonesia. This research uses secondary data for the period 1987-2021 obtained from the Food and Agriculture Organization (FAO). The study employs VectorAutoregressive (VAR). The results showed that agricultural land area has a positive and significant effect on GDP in the agricultural sector, while agricultural labor has a negative and significant effect on the GDP of  agricultural sector









													Author Biographies
											


																																							Nadila Sari, Universitas Malikussaleh


									Prodi Ekonomi Pembangunan, Fakultas Ekonomi dan Bisnis
								



																																							Hijri Juliansyah, Universitas Malikussaleh
